ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the recorded flight data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the recorded flight data */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier code (IATA) for the airline */,
  "carrier_name" TEXT /* Full name of the airline carrier */,
  "airport" TEXT /* IATA code for the airport of arrival */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the airport is located */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Full name of the airport */,
  "arr_flights" INTEGER /* Total number of arriving flights */,
  "arr_del15" INTEGER /* Number of flights arriving more than 15 minutes late */,
  "carrier_ct" REAL /* Carrier-specific count of operational metrics */,
  "weather_ct" INTEGER /* Count of weather-related incidents */,
  "nas_ct" INTEGER /* Count of National Airspace System delays */,
  "security_ct" INTEGER /* Count of security-related delays */,
  "late_aircraft_ct" INTEGER /* Count of late aircraft arrivals causing delays */,
  "arr_cancelled" INTEGER /* Number of cancelled arrivals */,
  "arr_diverted" INTEGER /* Number of diverted flights */,
  "arr_delay" INTEGER /* Total arrival delay in minutes */,
  "carrier_delay" REAL /* Total delay caused by the carrier in minutes */,
  "weather_delay" REAL /* Total delay caused by weather in minutes */,
  "nas_delay" REAL /* Total delay caused by the National Airspace System in minutes */,
  "security_delay" REAL /* Total delay caused by security in minutes */,
  "late_aircraft_delay" REAL /* Total delay caused by late aircraft arrivals in minutes */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number */,
  "departure_airport" TEXT /* IATA code for the departure airport */,
  "departure_city" TEXT /* City where the departure airport is located */,
  "departure_state" TEXT /* State where the departure airport is located */,
  "arrival_airport" TEXT /* IATA code for the arrival airport */,
  "arrival_city" TEXT /* City where the arrival airport is located */,
  "arrival_state" TEXT /* State where the arrival airport is located */,
  "scheduled_departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "actual_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time */,
  "scheduled_arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_carrier FOREIGN KEY ("carrier") REFERENCES carriers ("carrier_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_airport FOREIGN KEY ("airport") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "carriers" (
  "carrier_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each airline carrier (IATA code) */,
  "carrier_name" TEXT /* Full name of the airline carrier */,
  "carrier_country" TEXT /* Country where the airline carrier is based */,
  "carrier_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the airline carrier */,
  "carrier_email" TEXT /* Email address of the airline carrier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carrier_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each airport (IATA code) */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Full name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "airport_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the airport */,
  "airport_email" TEXT /* Email address of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "delay_causes" (
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay cause category */,
  "cause_name" TEXT /* Name of the delay cause */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the delay cause */,
  "cause_category" TEXT /* Category of the delay cause */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the recorded metrics */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the recorded metrics */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier code for the airline */,
  "airport" TEXT /* Airport code for the arrivals */,
  "total_arrivals" INTEGER /* Total number of arrivals at the airport */,
  "on_time_arrivals" INTEGER /* Number of on-time arrivals */,
  "cancellations" INTEGER /* Number of cancellations */,
  "diversions" INTEGER /* Number of diverted flights */,
  "delay_rate" REAL /* Delay rate (percentage) */,
  "average_delay_minutes" REAL /* Average delay in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_carrier FOREIGN KEY ("carrier") REFERENCES carriers ("carrier_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_airport FOREIGN KEY ("airport") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_comments" TEXT /* Comments about the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight being commented on */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_comments_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delay_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay report */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight being reported on */,
  "delay_cause" TEXT /* Cause of the delay */,
  "delay_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the delay in minutes */,
  "delay_description" TEXT /* Description of the delay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delay_reports_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the preference */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight data being changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
